generated_oml:
instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures input current I_M of the permanent magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InputCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Mounted on motor to measure angular position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Mounted behind gearbox to measure angular position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance InputCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance InputCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured input current I_M data from current sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InputCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular position data from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance GearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular position data from secondary encoder behind gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SysMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram and Internal Block Diagram for robot axis components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation models for motor, gearwheel, and gearbox with friction models (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance AASModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for metadata and traceability"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling (Block Definition Diagram, Internal Block Diagram)"
    DTDFVocab:enables MotionAccuracyEnhancementService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for simulation of motor, gearwheel, and gearbox with friction models (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre)"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyEnhancementService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for metadata and traceability"
    DTDFVocab:enables MetadataTraceabilityService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming from physical sensors to digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStreamingService
]

instance SINUMERIKEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for robot operation"
    DTDFVocab:enables RobotOperationService
]

instance DashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for real-time monitoring and analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of static, kinetic, and viscous friction using white-box (e.g., Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck) and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyEnhancementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Motion accuracy enhancement through model refinement using friction model parameters"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAlgorithmUpdateAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated dashboard visualization for real-time monitoring and analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualizationInsight
]

instance DataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time sensor data streaming via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStreamInsight
]

instance MetadataTraceabilityService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Metadata and traceability management via Asset Administration Shells"
    DTDFVocab:provides TraceabilityInsight
]

instance RobotOperationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Robot operation control via SINUMERIK CNC controller"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlCommandAction
]

instance FrictionParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction model parameters derived from simulation vs measured data deviations"
]

instance DashboardVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring and analysis via dashboard visualization"
]

instance DataStreamInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time data availability for processing and simulation"
]

instance TraceabilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Metadata traceability information for components"
]

instance ControlAlgorithmUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Updating control algorithms based on friction model parameters to enhance motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ControlCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusting motor commands for robot operation via SINUMERIK controller"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor with input current I_M and output torque τ_M"
]

instance GearTransmission : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gear transmission component with output torque τ_G"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox with output torque τ_out"
]

instance RobotAxis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "First axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot with working range [-90°, 90°] and max speed 75°/s"
]

instance RobotEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains RobotAxis, PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, GearTransmission, CycloidalGearbox
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with sensor data streamed via MQTT, enabling continuous model updates and friction identification during robot operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of SysML structural models, Simulink simulation models, live sensor data via MQTT, and AAS metadata into a unified digital shadow framework, with Processing components for model execution and a dashboard for visualization, all focused on the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated), focusing on real-time data from the robot during active machining tasks to monitor and improve motion accuracy."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated data (from Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, etc. models) against reference values from sensor measurements, with error analysis to refine model parameters for improved accuracy."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data transmission from robot to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standards for data traceability and metadata, SysML for system modeling, and MQTT for communication."
]
